The bug is caused by `getE2EEWellKnown` exposing only `default` semantics to `privateShouldBeEncrypted` while `CreateRoomDialog` and `createRoom` rely on `privateShouldBeEncrypted`/`opts.encryption`, so `.well-known` `force_disable` is never used to hide the encryption option or remove `EventType.RoomEncryption`.
